side.description: The option side (only applicable for equity-option type)

quantity.description: Number of contracts or shares (1-10 for options, 1-100 for stocks)

strikeSelection.description: How to select the strike for this leg

strikeRelativeLeg.description: Index of the leg to use as reference when strike selection is relative to another leg

delta.description: Delta value when strikeSelection is "delta" (expressed as integer from 1 to 100)

percentageOTM.description: Percentage OTM when strikeSelection is "percentageOTM" or "percentageOTMRelative" (e.g. 0.1 for 10% OTM, -0.1 for 10% ITM)

currentPriceOffset.description: Offset from current price when strikeSelection is currentPriceOffset related (max 50000)

daysUntilExpiration.description: Days until expiration for this leg
